sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 18:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 18:1
items.html: See answer No. 7. Three illuminations operated in Nekudim: the vapor of the Tabur, the vapor of Yesod, and the vapor of the Tzipornayim of the Raglayim. The vapor of the Tabur is the phase of dots above the letters, meaning Holam. The vapor of Yesod is the phase of dots inside the letters, which is the Melafum, and the vapor of the Tzipornayim of the Raglayim is the phase of dots under the letters. (Part 6, Item 28, and Inner Light there)
